CREATE TABLE test_epoch (id INT PRIMARY KEY, timestamp_value TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO test_epoch VALUES (1, sys.epoch(0.000));
INSERT INTO test_epoch VALUES (2, sys.epoch(1234567890.456));
INSERT INTO test_epoch VALUES (3, sys.epoch(-1234567890.999));
INSERT INTO test_epoch VALUES (4, sys.epoch(2147483647.999));
INSERT INTO test_epoch VALUES (5, sys.epoch(-2147483648.000));
SELECT id, timestamp_value FROM test_epoch WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, timestamp_value FROM test_epoch ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;
CREATE TABLE test_epoch_join (ep_id INT REFERENCES test_epoch(id), event VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_epoch_join VALUES (1, 'Event 1');
INSERT INTO test_epoch_join VALUES (2, 'Event 2');
SELECT e.id, e.timestamp_value, j.event FROM test_epoch e JOIN test_epoch_join j ON e.id = j.ep_id;
SELECT MAX(timestamp_value) FROM test_epoch WHERE id IN (SELECT ep_id FROM test_epoch_join WHERE event LIKE 'Event%');
SELECT e1.id, e1.timestamp_value FROM test_epoch e1 WHERE e1.timestamp_value > (SELECT MIN(timestamp_value) FROM test_epoch e2 WHERE e2.id != e1.id);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_epoch WHERE timestamp_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT e.id, e.timestamp_value - INTERVAL '1 hour' as adjusted_time FROM test_epoch e WHERE timestamp_value > sys.epoch(1000000000.0);
CREATE TABLE test_epoch_complex AS SELECT id, sys.epoch(123456.789) AS generated_timestamp FROM test_epoch;
SELECT AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM timestamp_value)) AS avg_epoch FROM test_epoch;
SELECT e1.id, e1.timestamp_value, e2.timestamp_value FROM test_epoch e1 CROSS JOIN test_epoch e2;
SELECT id, timestamp_value FROM test_epoch WHERE timestamp_value BETWEEN sys.epoch(1234567890) AND sys.epoch(1234567890.999);
